executives.name: Lawrence Culp, Jr.
executives.background: Mr. Culp has served as Chairman and CEO of GE since October 2018. He is also the CEO of GE Aerospace. Prior to joining GE, he served as President and CEO of Danaher Corporation from 2001 to 2014.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, CEO, GE Aerospace

executives.name: Rahul Ghai
executives.background: Mr. Ghai has served as Senior Vice President and CFO of GE since September 2023, and CFO of GE Aerospace since August 2022. He previously served as CFO of Otis Worldwide Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Vic Abate
executives.background: Mr. Abate is the CEO of GE Aerospace's Wind and Gas Power businesses and has held various leadership roles at GE since 1990.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Technology Officer

executives.name: Andrea Jung
executives.background: Ms. Jung has served as the President and CEO of Grameen America, a non-profit microfinance organization, since 2014. She previously served as Chairman and CEO of Avon Products, Inc.

executives.name: Ann Fudge
executives.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Young & Rubicam Brands.

executives.name: Brian Cothran
executives.background: Brian Cothran is the Chief Operating Officer of Venture Global LNG. He joined the company with extensive experience in the energy and industrial sectors, including roles at GE and Baker Hughes.

tenure_dates.title: Various leadership roles (including GE Oil & Gas)

executives.name: Catherine Lesjak
executives.background: Former CFO of HP Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Charlene Begley
executives.background: Ms. Begley served in various capacities at General Electric Company from 1988 to 2013, including as a Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer. She currently serves on the boards of Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. and Nasdaq, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer (and various other executive roles)

executives.name: Darren Walker
executives.background: President of the Ford Foundation.

executives.name: David Calhoun
executives.background: Former President and CEO of The Boeing Company; former Executive Chairman of Nielsen Holdings plc.

tenure_dates.title: Vice Chairman; President & CEO of GE Infrastructure

executives.name: Dmitri Stockton
executives.background: Former Senior Vice President of General Electric Company and former Chairman, President, and CEO of GE Asset Management.

executives.name: Edward Garden
executives.background: Chief Investment Officer and Founding Partner of Trian Fund Management, L.P.

executives.name: Elizabeth Comstock
executives.background: Elizabeth Comstock has served as a member of our Board since July 2021. Ms. Comstock previously served as Vice Chair of General Electric and as President of Integrated Media at NBC Universal.

executives.name: Frank Jimenez
executives.background: Frank R. Jimenez is Group Vice President and General Counsel of GE HealthCare and previously served as General Counsel of the Navy.

executives.name: Isabella Goren
executives.background: Former CFO of American Airlines and AMR Corporation.

executives.name: Michael Neal
executives.background: Retired Vice Chairman of General Electric Company and former Chairman and CEO of GE Capital.

executives.name: Neill Reynolds
executives.background: Neill P. Reynolds joined Wolfspeed in August 2018 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to joining Wolfspeed, Mr. Reynolds served as Senior Vice President of Finance, Strategy and Corporate Development at NXP Semiconductors N.V. and held various finance leadership roles at General Electric Company.

executives.name: Risa Lavizzo-Mourey
executives.background: Dr. Risa Lavizzo-Mourey has been a director since 2018. She is President Emerita of the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation and a professor at the University of Pennsylvania.

executives.name: Robert Nardelli
executives.background: Mr. Nardelli is the founder of XLR-8, LLC and previously served as Chairman and CEO of Chrysler LLC and The Home Depot, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: President and CEO of GE Power Systems

executives.name: Scott Strazik
executives.background: Scott Strazik is the Chief Executive Officer of GE Vernova. He has more than 20 years of operations and leadership experience. Prior to his current role, he served as CEO of GE’s Gas Power business and later as CEO of GE’s Power portfolio. He joined GE in 2000 and has held various leadership roles in finance, operations, and general management.

tenure_dates.title: CEO of GE Power (including Gas Power)

executives.name: Stephen Angel
executives.background: Former CEO of Linde plc. He has extensive experience in industrial and global operations.

executives.name: Sébastien Bazin
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Accor. He brings significant international business and hospitality experience.

executives.name: Thomas Horton
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of American Airlines.

executives.name: Wesley Bush
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation.
